code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn find_nonws(_ line: String, _ from: Int, _ n: Int) -> Int
  mut i = from
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if i >= n
      done = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          done = true
        end
      when None
        done = true
      end
    end
  end
  i
end

fn find_ws(_ line: String, _ from: Int, _ n: Int) -> Int
  mut i = from
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if i >= n
      done = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          done = true
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        done = true
      end
    end
  end
  i
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let start = find_nonws(line, i, n)
      if start >= n
        i = n
      else
        let stop = find_ws(line, start, n)
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, stop)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = stop
      end
    end
    let total = nums.len()
    mut out = ""
    mut j = total - 1
    mut first = true
    while j >= 0
      match nums.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j - 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
